activities.title: Manage Session Shared Context
activities.description: Maintain a structured, incrementally-updated knowledge surface per main session, serving subagent injection, compaction summary, and session recovery

activities.title: Update Context From Turn
activities.description: Process completed assistant turn tool parts and text to incrementally append new knowledge into the shared context space

activities.title: Extract Tool Knowledge
activities.description: Walk tool parts from the completed turn; map each tool type (read/edit/write/glob/grep/bash/task) to files[] and actions[] entries

activities.title: Extract Text Insights
activities.description: Apply heuristic regex patterns to assistant text to populate goal, discoveries, and currentState fields without LLM call

activities.title: Deduplicate File Entries
activities.description: Merge file entries sharing the same path; upgrade operation rank (read→edit→write) and preserve latest metadata

activities.title: Enforce Budget Limit
activities.description: Estimate token size of space; if exceeding budget, invoke consolidate to compress oldest entries

activities.title: Inject Context Into Subagent
activities.description: Synchronously snapshot the shared context space and prepend it to the subagent's first user message before dispatch

activities.title: Generate Context Snapshot
activities.description: Serialize the shared context space into a formatted text block wrapped in <shared_context> tags

activities.title: Seed Subagent Message
activities.description: Create synthetic user message containing snapshot + task prompt text, insert into subagent session before dispatch

activities.title: Compact With Shared Context
activities.description: Use shared context snapshot as compaction summary, replacing LLM compaction agent call; serves both idle and overflow paths

activities.title: Evaluate Compaction Eligibility
activities.description: Inspect budget utilization against configurable threshold; decide whether to compact or skip

activities.title: Write Compaction Summary
activities.description: Create summary message from snapshot, mark old messages as compacted, publish Compacted event

activities.title: Emit Continue Prompt
activities.description: In auto mode, append synthetic continue message so session resumes from shared context

activities.title: Consolidate Oversize Space
activities.description: Compress the shared context space when it exceeds its own token budget by merging old entries and trimming low-priority items

activities.title: Trim Old Actions
activities.description: Keep only the most recent 20 action entries; discard older ones

activities.title: Collapse Directory Files
activities.description: When a directory has more than 5 file entries, merge them into a single summary entry

activities.title: Prune Oldest Discoveries
activities.description: Keep only the most recent 10 discovery entries; remove oldest if still over budget
